title: Smoky Spinach Flatbread
description: A delicious flatbread topped with smoky spinach, perfect for a light meal.
instructions: Roll out the flatbread and place on a baking sheet.
Spread the smoky spinach evenly over the flatbread.
Sprinkle italian seasoning on top of the spinach.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until the bread is crispy and the spinach is heated through.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
